tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate an image from a text prompt. Use when the user explicitly asks for an image, drawing, illustration, or visual.

prompt.description: The text prompt describing the desired image.

n.description: Number of images to generate. Optional, default 1.

tools.name: edit_image
tools.description: Edit an existing image with an edit prompt. Use when the user provides an image and asks for a modification.

image.description: Base64-encoded source image, or a URL to the image.

prompt.description: The edit instruction (e.g. 'make the sky purple').

tools.name: text_to_speech
tools.description: Synthesise speech audio from text. Use when the user asks for spoken output, audio narration, or a voice response.

tools.name: transcribe_audio
tools.description: Transcribe audio to text. Use when the user provides an audio file or recording and asks for a transcript.

audio.description: Base64-encoded audio file (WAV/MP3/etc.) or a URL.

tools.name: analyze_image
tools.description: Analyse the contents of an image and answer a question about it. Use when the user provides an image and asks what's in it, to read text in it, or to reason about it.

image.description: Base64-encoded image, or a URL to the image.

question.description: What to ask about the image.

tools.name: embed_text
tools.description: Compute embedding vectors for one or more text snippets. Use only when the user explicitly asks for embeddings or a similarity computation.

input.description: One or more text strings to embed.

tools.name: rerank_documents
tools.description: Reorder a list of documents by relevance to a query. Use only when the user explicitly asks for reranking or relevance scoring.

query.description: The query the documents will be ranked against.

top_n.description: Return only the top N. Optional.

tools.name: route_to_chat
tools.description: Delegate a single message to another chat slot (e.g. 'coder' for code questions, 'agent' for tool-using tasks). Use only when a specialised model would clearly do better.

target.description: Slot name to delegate to. Must be an enabled chat slot.

prompt.description: Self-contained task description for the target slot.

context.description: Optional: bullet-summary of prior conversation the target should know.
